typeId.description: Optional. Restrict findings to members declared on this type (canonical / qualified / short). Read+write counting still scans every loaded compilation.

moduleScope.description: Optional. Restrict findings to members declared in this module/asmdef.

includeFieldReadWithoutWrite.description: Run the field-read-without-write pass (private/internal mutable fields read with zero writes). Default true.

includeDelegateSlots.description: Run the delegate-slot-never-assigned pass (Func/Action/custom-delegate fields & properties with zero assignment sites). Default true.

maxFindings.description: Optional. Cap on findings returned; defaults to 200. Zero / negative clamps to the default.

summarize.description: When true, force the compact triage cap (25 findings) regardless of maxFindings; `kindBreakdown` still counts every finding. Default false.

profileScope.description: Optional. Define profile to scope IOperation extraction to. Currently must match the retained profile. INV-MULTI-DEFINE-IOP-001.
